headline: Northern Trust Collaborates with Industry Peers to Strengthen Data and AI Interoperability
summary: CHICAGO, June 03, 2026--Northern Trust today announced at Snowflake’s annual user conference, Snowflake Summit 26, that it is a founding member of the Financial Services Working Group under Open Semantic Interchange (OSI).

headline: Northern Trust Asset Management Announces Adaptive Equity Funds
summary: LONDON, June 03, 2026--NTAM has launched two actively managed UCITS funds designed to help investors navigate increasingly complex and fast changing markets.
